ksa_text: Skill in managing cross-functional data and AI programs, including workstream coordination, dependency tracking, stakeholder communication, and escalation management.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-001 (OP, Skill) maps to Survey Researcher scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.5058 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.506, eu_ai_act=0.466, ddat=0.425. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5058 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-S-001 (OP, composite 0.5058) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5058 for OP domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.506, eu_ai_act=0.466, ddat=0.425 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5058 exceeds external evidence threshold for OP domain inclusion in Survey Researcher.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5058, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
